markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Handover to Megan and align on Q1/Q2 content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Confirmed:** Continue the successful "Retrieval-first" strategy, using high-traffic utility content (e.g., state-by-state clusters) to build authority and attract users for upsells.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [**New Focus:** Develop content on Tavrn's key differentiators—workflow, ease of use, and features like deduplication—to counter competitor "AI" claims without framing it as a paralegal productivity tool.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [**Performance:** Organic traffic grew from \~35 clicks/day to \~100 clicks/day since September, driven by content clusters and high-performing case analyses.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [**Logistics:** Megan D'Arcy now leads the relationship; syncs move to bi-weekly starting Jan 22.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**"Retrieval-first" Model:** Retrieval content is the primary acquisition channel, successfully driving hundreds of new customers. Other products (e.g., Chronology, Demand Letters) serve as the upsell pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [**Content Clusters:** The core strategy is building state-by-state clusters from high-traffic pillar pages.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
      - [**Statute of Limitations:** This cluster finishes this week (5 articles).](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - [**Proven Success:** Previous clusters (Malpractice Caps, Punitive Damages) showed high traffic and engagement, validating the model.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
      - [**Future Candidates:** Paralegal requirements by state is a strong candidate for a new cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Case Analyses:** These articles are a powerful traffic driver. GrowthX will continue identifying high-volume cases (e.g., Starbucks) to analyze.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)

### New Content Focus: Differentiation

  - [**Goal:** Counter competitor "AI" claims by highlighting Tavrn's unique value.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [**Key Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
      - [Workflow orchestration & ease of use.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [Specific features like record deduplication and re-pagination.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [**Strategic Framing:**](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [Focus on product features, not broad "legal AI" topics.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [Avoid framing as a paralegal productivity tool to prevent job-displacement concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
      - [GrowthX needs detailed input on these differentiators to create robust content.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)

### Analytics & Logistics

  - [**Analytics:**](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**GA4:** Matt will investigate if the homepage "jump link" and "request demo" forms are tracked as the same "form start" event.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
      - [**Looker:** The conversion event view tracks the full user funnel from session start to demo request.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Publishing Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
      - [**Standard:** Content goes directly to publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
      - [**Review:** Tavrn reviews articles on sensitive topics or new feature descriptions.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
      - [**Ownership:** Megan D'Arcy is now the primary contact.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
      - [**Frequency:** Syncs will move to bi-weekly to allow more time for updates.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - [Finalize and publish the 5 remaining Statute of Limitations articles.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [Investigate GA4 tracking for the homepage "jump link" and "request demo" forms.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
      - [Continue identifying high-traffic case analysis candidates.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [**Tavrn (Megan):**](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
      - [Provide detailed information on Tavrn's product differentiators (workflow, specific features) to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
      - [Request the Webflow API key from Vitor (once available) to streamline the publishing workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
      - [Next sync: Bi-weekly, scheduled for January 22.](https://fathom.video/share/SAGsn6gzpghKkmm1HYEayj2CsEw3BWnn?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
